# DC Insurance

> Independent health insurance agency in Middle Tennessee run by Denton Casey, a licensed agent (TN License #3002519070, NPN 20716644). DC Insurance compares every available lane — ACA marketplace plans, employer options, and medically underwritten private PPO plans — to build the strongest protection possible for the dollar. Primary clients: self-employed individuals, 1099 contractors, small business owners, and households above the ACA subsidy threshold.

Website: https://dcinsuranceagency.com
Service area: Nashville and Middle Tennessee
Book a call: https://tidycal.com/denton/intro-call

## Who We Help

- [Self-Employed](https://dcinsuranceagency.com/self-employed-health-insurance-tennessee): Health insurance options for self-employed Tennesseans
- [1099 Contractors](https://dcinsuranceagency.com/1099-health-insurance-tennessee): Coverage for independent contractors
- [Small Business Owners](https://dcinsuranceagency.com/small-business-health-insurance-tennessee): Group and individual strategies
- [Private PPO Plans](https://dcinsuranceagency.com/private-ppo-health-insurance-tennessee): Medically underwritten private PPO coverage
- [ACA vs. Private Plans](https://dcinsuranceagency.com/aca-vs-private-health-insurance-tennessee): Honest comparison of both lanes
- [Above Subsidy Threshold](https://dcinsuranceagency.com/above-aca-subsidy-health-insurance-tennessee): Options when you earn too much for ACA subsidies
- [Real Estate Agents](https://dcinsuranceagency.com/real-estate-agent-health-insurance-tennessee): Coverage for Realtors on commission income
- [Owner-Operators](https://dcinsuranceagency.com/owner-operator-health-insurance-tennessee): Health insurance for independent truckers
- [Musicians](https://dcinsuranceagency.com/musician-health-insurance-tennessee): Coverage for working musicians and artists

## Key Pages

- [About](https://dcinsuranceagency.com/about-us): Who Denton Casey is and how the agency works
- [Services](https://dcinsuranceagency.com/services): What DC Insurance does
- [Contact](https://dcinsuranceagency.com/contact): Get in touch
- [Blog](https://dcinsuranceagency.com/dc-insurance-blog): Plain-English guides to health insurance in Tennessee
- [Glossary](https://dcinsuranceagency.com/health-insurance-glossary): Health insurance terms explained

## Notes

- Coverage availability and eligibility vary by state and individual circumstances.
- Content is general information, not medical, legal, or tax advice.
